since_last: 61% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +6.19%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 61% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.08% · BTC -4.49% · Gold -2.69% · Nasdaq100 +2.39%. 61% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +6.19%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +6.19%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.42%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MRVL is the standout at +12.07%
cards.body: Leaders: MRVL +12.07%, SMR +10.64%, INTC +10.51%, SMCI +9.81%, KLAC +8.89%. Laggards: SPCX -9.60%, INOD -7.51%, IBM -5.16%, MDB -3.11%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -9.60% at $173.41
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -9.60% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
